${msg}（左侧为原图；请重启 DanmuAI 后重试）: ${msg} (original on left; restart DanmuAI and retry)
- 当前快照未发现明显调度或 timing 异常: - No obvious scheduling or timing issues in current snapshot
- 检查弱网、上游模型响应时间或过慢的视觉请求: - Check weak network, upstream model latency, or slow visual requests
- 检查请求 timing 是否长时间未消费，重点看 reply/error 清: - Check if request timing was not consumed for long; focus on reply/error cleanup path
5 个槽位默认都使用当前默认桌宠。你可以分别为每个槽位切换资源，位置会在桌面上独: All 5 slots use the current default pet by default. You can switch assets per slot; positions are saved independently on the desktop.
<p class=\"announcements-error\">未配置云端公告: Cloud announcements not configured. Copy supabase-config.example.js to supabase-config.js and fill in project URL and key.
<p class=\"text-sm text-gray-400\">暂无模型配: No model profiles yet—click Add above~
AI 回复在入队等待上屏时的最大条数。0 表示不裁剪；>0 时超出会从队首丢弃最: Max queued AI replies before display. 0 = no trim; >0 drops oldest from front when exceeded.
AI 服务返回错误（${error}），请稍后再试: AI service returned an error (${error}); please try again later
AI 生成弹幕最多显示多少字（5–80），超出会截断并加省略号。公式化弹幕（自定: Max characters for AI danmu (5–80); excess truncated with ellipsis. Formula danmu (custom/meme pools) show in full. Default ~15 CN / ~40 EN if unset.
AI 管家内部错误，请重试: AI Butler internal error; please retry
API 与模型、麦克风模式、AI读弹幕、弹幕显示、识图区域、识图清晰度、字体设置: API & model, mic mode, AI danmu reader, danmu display, capture region, capture quality, and font settings. For persona and prompts, go to Persona Studio.
GitHub Releases 镜像链接已复制到剪贴板: GitHub Releases mirror link copied to clipboard
JPEG 压缩质量 1–100，默认 85。越高图越清楚、文件越大。: JPEG quality 1–100, default 85. Higher = clearer, larger file.
MiMo：作为 user 消息控制语气；留空则仅朗读弹幕正文。: MiMo: sent as a user message to control tone; leave blank to read danmu text only.
OpenRouter 等自定义 OpenAI 兼容网关：若模型文档声明支持音频理: For OpenRouter and other OpenAI-compatible gateways: if the model docs declare audio support, check this to attach mic audio.
WebSocket 连接数已达上限，请关闭其他控制台窗口后刷新页面: WebSocket connections full; close other console windows and refresh

[realtime] 日志 WebSocket 未连接；约 1s 内会改用 HT: [realtime] Log WebSocket not connected; will fall back to HTTP polling within ~1s.

}」不支持开麦；请在麦克风标签改选 mimo-v2.5 或开启「与识图模型相同」: }」does not support mic; switch to mimo-v2.5 or enable「Same as capture model」in Mic tab, save, then start danmu.
}」可能听不懂麦克风。请改选带「支持麦克风」的模型（例如 doubao-seed: }」may not understand the mic. Pick a model with「Supports microphone」(e.g. doubao-seed-2-0-mini), save, then start danmu.
}」未声明 mic_audio 支持。请在模型配置档案中勾选「支持麦克风」，或改: }」does not declare mic_audio support. Enable「Supports microphone」in model profiles, use Doubao/MiMo, or configure separately in Mic tab.
· 所选设备不可用，已回退到系统默认: · Selected device unavailable, using system default
❌ 应用设置超时，请重试: ❌ Apply settings timed out, please retry
❤️ 感谢支持的朋友，您的每一份帮助都让 DanmuAI 变得更好！: ❤️ Thank you for your support—every bit of help makes DanmuAI better!
。TTS API Key 与弹幕设置中的视觉 API Key: . TTS API Key and the visual API Key in Danmu Settings
「测试麦克风」只检查有没有声音，不会联网；「测试发送」会录音并请求 AI。请先点: 「Test microphone」checks for sound only—no network.「Test send」records and requests AI. Save settings first. For Bluetooth headsets, set the headset as default mic in Windows Settings → System → Sound → Input.
一条指令最多影响几次截图弹幕生成（1–5 次）。: Max screenshot danmu generations per command (1–5).
一行一条短句，保存后上屏时完整展示、不截断。重复句会自动跳过。: One short line per row; full display on screen. Duplicates skipped.
一行一条，保存后上屏时完整展示，无字数限制。: One line per row; full display on screen, no character limit.
上传一张样图，预览当前「最大宽度」和「JPEG 质量」下的压缩效果。图片只在内存: Upload a sample image to preview compression at current max width and JPEG quality. In-memory only.
下载超时，请稍后重试: Download timed out; please try again later
不同。OpenRouter、One API 等普通聊天模型通常: different. OpenRouter, One API, and other chat models usually
且屏幕上有可见弹幕时才会朗读；停止生成后不再请求。: and only reads when visible danmu are on screen; stops requesting after generation stops.
为该人格选择模型（默认跟随全局\"使用\"模型）: Pick a model for this persona (defaults to global「In use」model)
为麦克风接话选择服务商预设，会自动填入麦克风 API 地址与模式。OpenAI: Pick a provider preset for mic replies; fills mic API endpoint and mode. OpenAI-compatible presets may not support audio—check model docs or enable「Supports microphone」in model profiles.
主题已更新，下一次生成会使用新内容: Topic updated; next generation will use the new content
人格名称不能包含 / \\\\ % # ? 等特殊字符: Persona name cannot contain / \\ % # ? or other special characters
人格已更新，下一次生成会使用新内容: Persona updated; next generation will use the new content
仅「自选」分类时可选择标签，最多 3 个。: Tags only for Custom category, max 3.
仅列出目录中带「支持麦克风」标识的模型；豆包全模态或小米 MiMo 的 mimo: Lists only models marked「Supports microphone」; Doubao multimodal or Xiaomi MiMo mimo-v2.5.
从下到上模式的滚动速度（0.5–5.0，默认 1）。数值越大上移越快（引擎约 1: Bottom-to-top scroll speed (0.5–5.0, default 1). Higher = faster (~120×speed px/s).
从下到上模式窗口宽度（200–800 px），默认靠右显示。: Bottom-to-top panel width (200–800 px), right side by default.
从本地文件夹导入桌宠素材。目录需包含 pet.json 与 spriteshee: Import pet assets from folder with pet.json and spritesheet.webp or .png.
会话接口未返回 token，请重启 python main.py 并刷新页面: Session API did not return a token; restart python main.py and refresh the page
你的昵称，AI 可在合适时自然称呼你。全局生效，与当前人格无关；上限 20 字。: Your nickname for AI to use naturally. Global, persona-independent; max 20 chars.
使用语音合成定时随机朗读当前屏幕上的一条弹幕: Use TTS to randomly read one visible on-screen danmu on a timer
例如：刚切换自定义豆包后出现，期望提示填写 API 地址: e.g. after switching to custom Doubao, expect a prompt to fill API endpoint
例如：接下来弹幕偏搞笑一点: e.g. make upcoming danmu more humorous
例如：语气温柔治愈，像闺蜜一样吐槽主播操作，偶尔玩梗: e.g. gentle, healing tone; tease the streamer like a best friend, occasional memes
供 OBS、抖音直播伴侣等添加「浏览器源 / 网页源」，采集透明背景 AI 弹幕: For OBS, Douyin Live Companion, etc.: add a「Browser Source / Web Source」for transparent AI danmu (localhost 127.0.0.1).
先复制地址，粘贴到直播软件的浏览器源 / 网页源。: Copy the URL first, then paste it into your streaming app's browser/web source.
入口区（屏幕右侧待滚入）最多保留几条 pending 弹幕。新装默认 300；填: Max pending danmu in entry zone (right edge). Default 300; 0 = unlimited. Drops farthest off-screen items, not new ones.
全局快捷键，随时开始或停止生成弹幕。首次使用可能需在系统里允许本程序监听键盘。: Global hotkey to start/stop danmu. OS may ask to allow keyboard listening first time.
全展示：采集结果全部进入展示队列。AI识别展示：由 AI 根据当前画面从候选中筛: Show all: all collects go to display queue. AI pick: AI filters candidates by current screen.
关闭自定义公式化弹幕库后，不会进行公式化弹幕补足。: With custom formula danmu pool off, no formula danmu fill will occur.
凭证缺失，请检查 API Key 与端点配置: Credentials missing; check API Key and endpoint settings
切换后，后续对话自动使用新模型；当前对话历史保留。: After switching, new chats use the new model; current history is kept.
创意程度（0–2）。越高弹幕用词越发散，越低越稳定、越像固定话术。: Creativity (0–2). Higher = more varied wording; lower = steadier, more formulaic tone.
加入社群或在群内 @ 我，比私信更不容易触发平台限制: Join the community or @ me in group chat—less likely to hit platform limits than DMs
加载失败，请刷新页面重试: Load failed; refresh the page and retry
勾选后可选中列表全部自定义句，便于批量删除。: When checked, select all custom lines for batch delete.
勾选多个人格后，运行时每轮随机选一个生成弹幕；点「保存激活列表」生效。: Multiple checked personas: one random per round; Save active list to apply.
区域无效或过小，请重新框选: Region invalid or too small; please re-select
单次 AI 回复允许的最长输出。开启「思考」类模型时，程序会自动提高实际下限。: Max output length per AI reply. Thinking models get a higher effective minimum automatically.
双击桌宠弹出指令框: Double-click pet to open command box
反馈已提交，感谢你的帮助~: Feedback submitted—thank you for your help~
发给 AI 前把截图缩到多宽。越小越省流量和费用，越大越清晰。: Screenshot width before sending to AI. Smaller = less bandwidth/cost; larger = sharper.
另外：当前 API 地址与已选模型目录不一致，保存配置时可能被拒绝，请重新选择视: Also: current API endpoint does not match selected model catalog; save may be rejected—re-select the vision model.
另有升级前累计 ${formatTokenCount(legacyExtra)}: Plus ${formatTokenCount(legacyExtra)} pre-upgrade tokens (input/output not split; included in historical total)
只读展示调度、RTT、cooldown 与 runtime 摘要: Read-only view of scheduling, RTT, cooldown, and runtime summary
只读的 JSON 输出格式要求。每次生成条数与弹幕设置「弹幕显示」中的条数同步；: Read-only JSON output contract. Count syncs with Danmu display settings; change count there.
可刷新页面或重启 DanmuAI。: Refresh the page or restart DanmuAI.
名称显示已更新，下一次生成会使用新内容: Name display updated; next generation will use the new setting
后再框选。截图只在内存里压缩后发给 AI，: then re-select. Screenshots are compressed in memory only before sending to AI,
听懂麦克风并生成接话弹幕的模型；与识图视觉模型可不同。: Model that hears the mic and generates reply danmu; can differ from the vision model.
启用后，系统会从你保存的自定义弹幕句中抽取短句，用于弹幕不足时补足。: When on, pulls short lines from your custom pool when danmu count is low.
告诉 AI 管家想调整什么: Tell AI Butler what to adjust
告诉我你想调整什么设置，例如「把弹幕速度调快」: Tell me what to adjust, e.g.「speed up danmu」
告诉我想调整什么设置... (Enter 发送，Shift+Enter 换行): Tell me what to adjust... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
和最近弹幕有多像就算重复（0–1）。越高越容易判重复并丢掉，默认约 0.5。: Similarity threshold vs recent danmu (0–1). Higher = more duplicates dropped; default ~0.5.
在 Web 页调试注入弹幕指令；不会立即请求 AI，而是并入下一次正常截图生成。: Debug-inject danmu command on Web; merged into next normal capture, not immediate AI call.
地址已复制。保存直播软件的网页源后，连接数会自动变为 1 或更多。: URL copied. After saving the web source in your streaming app, connections will show 1 or more.
复制失败，请手动选择复制: Copy failed; please select and copy manually
复制失败，请手动选择文本复制: Copy failed; please select text and copy manually
如果您正在使用 DanmuAI 并感觉到给您带来了帮助，或者是想支持我继续开发，: If DanmuAI has helped you or you'd like to support continued development, you can support me in any of these ways:
实际调用的模型名称或接入点 ID。也可在下方「模型配置档案」里保存多套 endp: Model name or endpoint ID. You can also save multiple endpoint/key/model sets in「Model profiles」below.
实验功能：说完一句话后额外生成几条接话弹幕，插队显示，不影响看屏识图节奏。需豆包: Experimental: after you speak, extra reply danmu are generated and shown out of order without affecting capture rhythm. Needs Doubao + mic-capable model; off by default; audio stays in memory only. Uses Windows default mic (Settings → System → Sound → Input); after switching headsets, stop danmu or restart.
对应 API 中 role 为 user 的消息，用于控制语气与风格；新装默认已: Maps to API user-role message for tone/style; fresh install has a tear-jerker preset; blank reads danmu text only.
小助手正在为你生成暖心弹幕~: Assistant is generating cozy danmu for you~
小助手正在待命，随时为你生成暖心弹幕~: Assistant is on standby, ready to generate cozy danmu anytime~
屏幕上最多几行弹幕轨道（12–20 行）。: Max danmu track rows on screen (12–20).
已启用 · 将显示普通单桌宠（保存后生效）: Enabled · single pet will show (after save)
已启用 · 已隐藏（可在桌宠右键菜单显示）: Enabled · hidden (show via pet context menu)
已填入 ${provider.label} 的默认地址，请填写对应 API 密钥: Filled default endpoint for ${provider.label}; please enter the API key~
已填入 ${provider.label} 的默认麦克风地址，请填写对应 API: Filled default mic endpoint for ${provider.label}; please enter the API key~
已恢复默认值，请点击「保存配置」生效: Defaults restored; click Save settings to apply
已检测到网页源连接。发送测试弹幕，确认直播画面能看到弹幕。: Web source connected. Send a test danmu to confirm it appears in your stream.
开启后双击桌宠可弹出弹幕指令输入框。: Double-click pet to open danmu command box.
开启后固定展示 5 个桌宠，弹幕会以聊天气泡形式显示在桌宠头顶。: When on, shows 5 fixed pets; danmu appear as chat bubbles above pets.
开启后按下方配置独立采集与展示烂梗弹幕，不与 AI 生成弹幕共用展示额度。: When on, meme danmu are collected/displayed separately per settings below.
开启后桌宠将显示在桌面；临时隐藏请使用桌宠右键菜单。: When on, pet shows on desktop; hide temporarily via pet context menu.
开启后桌宠显示在桌面；临时隐藏请使用桌宠右键菜单。: Shows desktop pet; use pet context menu to hide temporarily.
开启后桌宠窗口始终置顶，不会被其它窗口遮挡。: Keeps pet window always on top.
开启后模型会先进行内部思考再生成弹幕，响应延迟增加且 Token 消耗上升。思考: When on, model thinks internally before danmu; higher latency and token use. Thinking is not shown in danmu.
开启后鼠标可穿透桌宠，但将无法拖动桌宠位置。: Mouse passes through pet; dragging disabled.
开启后，弹幕上屏为「人格名称：弹幕内容」: When on, danmu show as「Persona name: content」
开启后，说完一句话会额外生成几条接话弹幕，并插队显示，不影响看屏识图的节奏。请: When on, after you speak, extra reply danmu are generated and shown out of order without affecting capture rhythm. Please
开启时开麦与识图共用上方「API 与模型」的接口与模型；关闭后可在本标签单独配置: When on, mic uses the same API & model as capture above; when off, configure a mic-capable model in this tab.
弹幕显示区域占整块屏幕的比例（全屏、四分之三、一半、四分之一）。: Danmu area as fraction of screen (full, 3/4, 1/2, 1/4).
弹幕横向移动快慢（约 0.5–5）。数字越大滚得越快。: Horizontal danmu speed (~0.5–5). Higher = faster scroll.
当前 API 地址与模型「${st.active_model_id}」不匹配，请: Current API endpoint does not match model「${st.active_model_id}」; re-select vision model in Danmu Settings and save.
当前 API 模式不支持思考模式: Current API mode does not support thinking mode
当前分组无可恢复的表单项: No restorable fields in current group
当前展示：手动添加条目。txt 导入内容已入库参与抽取，但不在此列表逐条展示。: Showing: manual entries. TXT imports are in the pool but not listed here.
当前已手动固定设备；如设备拔出，将在运行时回退到系统默认输入。: Device pinned manually; if unplugged, runtime falls back to system default input.
当前模型可能忽略风格指令，留空则仅朗读弹幕正文。: Current model may ignore style instructions; blank reads danmu text only.
当前模型支持风格指令，将用于控制语气与情感。: Current model supports style instructions for tone and emotion.
当前默认模型来自模型配置档案「${name}」（${id}）。弹幕设置中的 AP: Default model from profile「${name}」(${id}). API endpoint/key in Danmu Settings are not used for generation—maintain them in Model profiles.
当屏幕上的弹幕少于该数量时，从自定义公式化弹幕库抽取短句补足。设为 0 则关闭补: When on-screen danmu fall below this, pull from custom pool. 0 disables fill.
当屏幕上的弹幕少于该数量时，会从自定义公式化弹幕库中抽取短句补足。: When on-screen danmu fall below this count, short lines are pulled from the custom formula pool.
录大约 3 秒后，把声音和占位图发给 AI，确认模型能收到你的麦克风输入。: After ~3s, sends audio + placeholder image to AI to verify mic input.
录大约 3 秒，检查麦克风是否有声音。不联网、不上传、不保存文件。: Records ~3s to check mic input. No network, upload, or file save.
录音中…请对着麦克风随便念几句话: Recording… say a few words into the mic
录音并发送中…请对着麦克风念几句话: Recording and sending… say a few words into the mic
录音约 3 秒后将发送到 AI，请对着麦克风说话: After ~3s recording, audio goes to AI—please speak into the mic
恢复为内置默认桌宠，不会删除你原来的本地素材文件。: Restore built-in default pet; your local asset files are kept.
恢复后仅更新表单，不会自动保存。请点击「保存配置」后才会写入本机配置。API 密: Restore updates the form only, not auto-saved. Click Save settings to write locally. API keys are not cleared or changed.
悬浮窗与屏幕右边缘的距离（px）。: Floating panel distance from right edge (px).
悬浮窗内每条弹幕的字号（12–48 px）。: Font size per danmu in floating panel (12–48 px).
悬浮窗同时显示的最多条数。超过时按 FIFO 丢最旧。: Max simultaneous danmu in floating panel; FIFO drops oldest.
我们的烂梗库内容来自开源项目: Our meme library content comes from open-source projects
我目前可以帮您调整弹幕设置，您可以试试说「把弹幕速度调快」: I can adjust danmu settings—try saying「speed up danmu」
截图和弹幕叠在哪块显示器上。编号无效时会自动改用主屏。: Which display to capture and overlay danmu on. Invalid index falls back to primary display.
所有轨道上同时保留的弹幕总条数上限。新装默认 600；填 0 表示无限制；超出时: Max total danmu on all tracks. Default 600; 0 = unlimited; drops off-screen pending first.
指令不会立即请求 AI，而是注入下一次正常截图弹幕生成；生成时会优先结合你的输入: Commands do not call AI immediately; they merge into the next normal capture. Generation prioritizes your input and current screen.
指令提交后在此秒数内有效（5–300 秒），超时自动失效。: Command valid for this many seconds (5–300), then expires.
接口不存在，请完全退出并重新运行 python main.py 后再试: Endpoint not found; fully quit and rerun python main.py, then retry
控制烂梗弹幕的上屏节奏：间隔秒数与每批展示条数。: Meme display rhythm: interval seconds and batch size.
控制烂梗弹幕的采集节奏：间隔秒数与每批采集条数。: Meme collect rhythm: interval seconds and batch size.
推荐：通过 Velopack 直接下载并安装（主更新源 R2）: Recommended: download and install via Velopack (primary R2 source)
描述本次你要玩的游戏或者直播主题等，以便 AI 更好地生成弹幕，文字尽量在 50: Describe the game or stream topic so AI can generate better danmu; under 50 chars works best
描述本次要玩的游戏或直播主题，便于 AI 生成更贴场景的弹幕。留空则不注入；建议: Game or stream topic for more contextual danmu. Empty = not injected; best under 50 chars, max 200.
无法加载默认配置，请刷新页面后重试: Cannot load defaults; refresh and retry
无法开始下一句；合成约需 10–20 秒，建议间隔 ≥15 秒。: Cannot start next line; synthesis takes ~10–20s; interval ≥15s recommended.
无法连接小助手，请确认 DanmuAI 已启动: Cannot connect; confirm DanmuAI is running
日志已关闭。点击「重新打开日志」按钮恢复显示。: Logs closed. Click Reopen logs to restore.
日志通道连接中… 若超过数秒仍无内容，请点左侧「温馨控制台」查看顶栏连接状态，或: Log channel connecting… If empty after seconds, check connection in Dashboard header or restart DanmuAI.
是否要将该问题反馈？我们将附带相关日志（已脱敏）。: Report this issue? We will attach related logs (redacted).
昵称已更新，下一次生成会使用新内容: Nickname updated; next generation will use the new content
普通模式下，每次识图固定生成几条弹幕（1–50 条）。: In normal mode, fixed danmu count per capture (1–50).
普通模式下，每隔多少秒识图并生成一批弹幕（1–60 秒）。: In normal mode, seconds between capture and danmu batch (1–60).
暂无记录，停止弹幕后会在此显示时间与 Token 用量: No records yet; stop danmu to see time and token usage here
暂时无法查询提交额度: Cannot query submit quota right now
暂时无法读取直播输出状态，请确认控制台服务仍在运行。: Cannot read live output status; confirm console service is running.
最多同时导入 5 个文件: Import at most 5 files at once
有任何问题可以在qq群/抖音群/小红书群内@我，因为最近很多人私信我，我一一回答: For questions, @ me in QQ/Douyin/Xiaohongshu groups. DMs triggered platform warnings—thanks for understanding. Email: utar00701233@163.com
未勾选「启用读弹幕」，定时朗读不会启动，请勾选后保存: 「Enable danmu reader」not checked; timed reading won't start—check and save
未获取会话令牌，请刷新页面或重启 DanmuAI: No session token; refresh or restart DanmuAI
未配置云端反馈服务，无法在线提交: Cloud feedback not configured; cannot submit online
未配置云端反馈服务，无法在线提交（仍可通过下方社群联系）: Cloud feedback not configured; cannot submit online (contact via community below)
未配置模型，请先到「弹幕设置 → API 与模型」配置: No model configured; set up in Danmu Settings → API & model first
本地库与待展示队列已清除: Local library and display queue cleared
某行轨道空了时，暂时加快滚动，让新弹幕更快占满空位。: When a track is empty, briefly speed up scroll to fill the gap.
根据当前表单值实时预览弹幕效果，不会保存或发送到 overlay。轨道带可视化反: Live preview from current form values; not saved or sent to overlay. Track bands show drawable area and margins for track rows and layout.
框选时按 Esc 或右键取消；区域过小（小于 10×10 像素）将视为无效。: Press Esc or right-click to cancel; region under 10×10 px is invalid.
桌宠弹幕模式已开启，请先在桌宠界面关闭后再修改。: Pet danmu mode is on; disable it in Pet settings before changing.
桌面互动宠物与弹幕指令入口；复用助手模型，不单独请求 AI: Desktop pet and danmu command entry; reuses assistant model, no separate AI call
模型 ID 长度超过 ${TAG_MAX_LEN} 字符，未添加: Model ID exceeds ${TAG_MAX_LEN} chars; not added
模型名、API 地址、服务商、API 模式（已脱敏）: Model name, API endpoint, provider, API mode (redacted)
模型目录加载失败，视觉模型列表可能为空，请刷新页面重试: Model catalog load failed; vision list may be empty—refresh and retry
模型配置档案：为不同接口地址、模型、密钥保存多套配置，可指定默认；这里的密钥与上: Model profiles: multiple endpoint/model/key sets with optional default; keys separate from global above.
横向弹幕使用的系统字体名。留空或填入不存在的字体名时回退到默认。: System font for horizontal danmu. Blank or invalid name uses default.
横向弹幕：全屏透明 Overlay 横向滚动。从下到上：右侧窄窗自下而上连续上滚: Horizontal: full-screen transparent overlay scroll. Bottom-to-top: narrow right panel scrolls up. Use borderless/windowed fullscreen for games; exclusive fullscreen may hide danmu.
正在框选…请在识图显示器上拖动鼠标（Esc 取消）: Selecting… drag on capture display (Esc to cancel)
正在通过 HTTP 同步日志… 若长时间仍为空，请确认已点击「生成弹幕」并有截图: Syncing logs via HTTP… If empty, confirm you clicked Start danmu and capture/AI activity exists.
步长为 ${stepAttr}，请输入合规值: Step is ${stepAttr}; enter a valid value
每次「生成弹幕」至「停止弹幕」为一轮；保存在本机配置库，重启后仍可查看最近 10: Each Start danmu to Stop danmu is one session; last 100 saved locally across restarts
每次固定 ${count} 条 · 保存后会同步到人格工坊的「输出契约」: Fixed ${count} per batch · syncs to Persona Studio「Output contract」after save
每次固定 5 条 · 保存后会同步到人格工坊的「输出契约」: Fixed 5 per batch · syncs to Persona Studio「Output contract」after save
每次说话时，附带最近多少秒的麦克风录音发给 AI（1–30 秒，默认 5）。: Seconds of recent mic audio sent with each utterance (1–30, default 5).
每隔若干秒随机选一条当前屏上可见弹幕合成语音（3–120 秒）。间隔过短会在上一: Every few seconds, randomly pick one visible danmu for TTS (3–120s). Too short an interval may interrupt the previous
清空本地烂梗库与待展示队列；不影响已上屏弹幕。: Clears local meme library and display queue; on-screen danmu unchanged.
温柔微颤语气，1.0倍速，温暖音色，独白式表达，句尾轻收配合自然呼吸停顿，情绪克: Gentle trembling tone, 1.0× speed, warm voice, monologue style, soft endings with natural pauses, restrained layered emotion—for tear-jerker healing danmu
源码模式不支持应用内更新: Source mode does not support in-app update
激活人格已更新，下一次生成会使用新内容: Active personas updated; next generation uses new selection
烂梗公式化与自定义公式化弹幕，可独立配置采集与展示: Meme formula and custom formula danmu—separate collect and display settings
烂梗展示间隔（1–60 秒）。每隔该秒数从待展示队列取出弹幕上屏。: Meme display interval (1–60s). Shows danmu from queue each interval.
烂梗采集间隔（1–60 秒）。每隔该秒数从源拉取一批候选弹幕。: Meme collect interval (1–60s). Pulls a batch of candidates each interval.
状态轮询失败，界面可能不是最新: Status poll failed; UI may be stale
用当前填写的地址、模式和密钥试连一次 AI，不开始弹幕，也不改其它设置。: Test AI with current endpoint, mode, and key—no danmu, no other changes.
用自然语言告诉我你想调整什么，我来帮你改设置: Tell me in natural language what to adjust—I will change settings for you
目录中需包含 pet.json 与 spritesheet.webp 或 spr: Folder must contain pet.json and spritesheet.webp or .png. Import replaces current pet; your original local files are kept.
直播弹幕评论员。只输出 JSON 字符串数组，无解释、无 Markdown。: Live danmu commentator. Output JSON string array only—no explanation or Markdown.
直播输出已接通。正式生成弹幕时会同步推送到网页源。: Live output connected. Formal danmu generation will push to the web source.
确定删除模型「${display}」吗？该档案包含 ${n} 个模型 ID，将一: Delete model profile「${display}」? It has ${n} model IDs. If default, the next profile becomes default.
确认删除已导入字体「${item.family}」？此操作不可撤销。: Delete imported font「${item.family}」? This cannot be undone.
空轨道时加速补位: Speed up when track is empty
第一个 chip 自动设为默认；删除默认 chip 后剩余第一个自动成为默认。: First chip is default; if default is deleted, the first remaining becomes default.
等待日志… 点击「生成弹幕」后，截图、AI 请求与弹幕事件会在此实时显示。: Waiting for logs… After Start danmu, capture, AI requests, and danmu events appear here in real time.
终端有「Web 控制台 HTTP/WS 已监听」，且已安装 uvicorn[st: Terminal shows「Web console HTTP/WS listening」and uvicorn[standard] (with websockets) is installed.
编辑系统提示；内置人格可覆盖保存，恢复默认可还原: Edit system prompt; built-ins can be overwritten; restore defaults to reset
自然：按正常速度滚出屏幕。加速：换场景或清屏时让旧弹幕更快消失。: Natural: normal scroll off screen. Accelerated: old danmu clear faster on scene change.
若应用内更新较慢，可使用镜像或网盘（非主更新源）: If in-app update is slow, use mirror or cloud drive (not primary source)
获取识图区域状态失败: Failed to get capture region status
视觉模型服务的网址。火山方舟豆包一般填到 /api/v3；多数 OpenAI 兼: Visual model service URL. Volcengine Ark (Doubao) usually uses /api/v3; most OpenAI-compatible services use /v1.
设置 AI 接口、用哪块屏幕识图、弹幕样式，以及截图与压缩参数。改完后点「保存配: Set AI API, capture display, danmu style, and screenshot/compression. Click Save settings to apply.
设置 AI 接口、识图屏幕和弹幕效果，保存后立即生效: Set AI API, capture screen, and danmu effects—applies after save
访问 AI 的密钥，保存在本机并加密。留空点「保存配置」不会覆盖已有密钥。: API key stored locally encrypted. Leaving blank on Save won't overwrite existing key.
试听可使用上方输入框中的 Key，无需先保存；定时朗读须保存并「开始生成」。: Preview can use the Key in the input above without saving; timed reading requires save and Start danmu.
说明：涉及 API Key、删除模型等敏感操作，我会指引你到设置页手动修改。: Note: for API Key, model deletion, etc., I will guide you to change settings manually.
请先在「温馨控制台」开始或停止弹幕；API 密钥留空保存不会改掉旧密钥；默认识图: Start or stop danmu in Dashboard first; blank API key on save won't overwrite existing key; default capture is fullscreen on selected display—drag a sub-region in Capture region; Model profiles can have separate endpoint and key.
请先输入要追加的弹幕句子: Enter danmu lines to append first
请在识图显示器上拖动鼠标框选区域~: Drag on the capture display to select a region~
请对着麦克风随便念几句话（约 3 秒）: Say a few words into the mic (~3 seconds)
请描述问题或建议（请勿填写 API Key、密码或截图中的敏感信息）: Describe the issue or suggestion (do not include API Key, passwords, or sensitive screenshot data)
请确认字体授权允许个人使用；DanmuAI 只在本机加载字体，不会上传到外部服务: Confirm font license allows personal use; DanmuAI loads fonts locally only.
请确认终端有「Web 控制台 HTTP/WS 已监听」，且地址栏为 http:/: Confirm terminal shows「Web console HTTP/WS listening」and URL is http://127.0.0.1:18765, then refresh.
请至少添加一个模型 ID: Add at least one model ID
请输入你的昵称（AI 可在合适时自然称呼你）: Enter your nickname (AI may use it naturally)
运行日志实时同步（WebSocket 优先，失败时自动 HTTP 轮询），已脱敏: Runtime log sync (WebSocket first, HTTP polling fallback), redacted—no API Key shown
返回音频，请勿直接复用弹幕生成模型。: Returns audio—do not reuse the danmu generation model directly.
追加到该人格系统提示词的风格与人格要求；点「保存人格」后生效。: Extra style/persona appended to system prompt; applies after Save persona.
选择 TXT 文件（一行一条），最多同时导入 5 个文件，每个文件最多 1000: Select TXT files (one line each); up to 5 files, 1000 lines each; appended to existing pool.
选择「默认」时不保存平台字段，朗读使用 MiMo 出厂配置。百炼须选择 TTS: 「Default」does not save platform field; MiMo factory TTS config is used. DashScope requires a TTS model.
选择下方教程查看使用说明: Pick a guide below for instructions
选择要编辑的人格模板。内置人格可覆盖保存，也可点「恢复默认」还原。: Persona template to edit. Built-ins can be overwritten; use Restore defaults to reset.
透明度过低可能导致弹幕完全不可见: Opacity too low may make danmu invisible
通过以下二维码进行赞助，打赏作者一杯茶 🍵: Sponsor via QR codes below—buy the author a tea 🍵
随机：从全库抽取。自选：限选最多 3 个标签。本地库：仅使用本地导入的烂梗句。: Random: from full library. Custom: up to 3 tags. Local: imported meme lines only.
麦克风专用 API 地址。豆包一般填到 /api/v3；MiMo 等 OpenA: Mic-only API endpoint. Doubao usually /api/v3; MiMo and OpenAI-compatible services /v1.
麦克风专用 API 密钥，与识图密钥分开加密保存。留空保存不会覆盖已有密钥。: Mic API key, encrypted separately from capture key. Blank save won't overwrite existing key.
麦克风可能无法识别你的声音：: Mic may not recognize your voice:
麦克风请求使用的 API 模式。开麦需 doubao 全模态或 MiMo 的 m: API mode for mic requests. Mic needs doubao multimodal or MiMo mimo-v2.5.
麦克风输入设备不可用：已选择的设备当前不存在，运行时将回退到系统默认（${def: Mic input unavailable: selected device missing; runtime falls back to system default (${defaultLabel ||
默认不会保存到硬盘: Not saved to disk by default
默认开启：开麦使用「API 与模型」里的接口与视觉模型。关闭后可单独配置支持麦克: Default on: mic uses API & model above. Off: configure a mic-capable model separately (capture still uses vision model).
默认跟随 Windows 当前默认录音设备；也可以手动固定到某一只麦克风。: Follows Windows default recording device; or pin a specific mic manually.
（仅界面展示，不参与 API）: (UI display only, not sent to API)
（保存在本机并加密，与识图密钥分开）: (saved locally, encrypted, separate from capture key)
（回车或逗号添加，点击 chip 切换默认）: (Enter or comma to add; click chip to set default)
（暂无模型档案，请到「弹幕设置 → API 与模型」添加）: (no model profiles—add in Danmu Settings → API & model)

；也可点击下方按钮用鼠标框选子区域（坐标相对该屏左上角）。请在「API 与模型」: ; or click below to drag a sub-region (coords relative to display top-left). Pick in「API & model」
；环境较吵时启动后会自动校准。录音只在内存里处理，不会保存到硬盘。: ; auto-calibrates in noisy environments. Audio stays in memory, not saved to disk.
；部分字符无法识别: ; some characters could not be recognized
